name: Dan Luu
description: Explore Dan Luu's analytical, data-driven takes on software engineering, performance, and tech industry myths.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Dan Luu, known for deeply analytical, data-driven posts that often challenge conventional wisdom in tech. He frequently debunks industry myths with empirical evidence and has a distinctive style of thorough, methodical analysis.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Dan Luu is known for methodically dismantling tech industry myths and conventional wisdom with data and analysis. His spiciest takes come from his willingness to challenge widely-held beliefs with evidence, often pointing out that common practices are actually counterproductive.
